data.title: Write RED tests for format_trailer_flags
data.description: Extend tests/unit/scripts/test-apply-attribution-trailers.sh with: test_format_trailer_flags_produces_two_flags_for_two_distinct_agents() (2 distinct subagent_type in JSONL -> 2 lines matching ^--trailer 'DSO-Agent:), test_format_trailer_flags_produces_no_flags_for_empty_jsonl() (empty JSONL -> no output; use grep -c . or wc -l to check for 0 lines, not wc -c which may include trailing newline), test_format_trailer_flags_produces_dso_skill_flags() (skill entry -> DSO-Skill flag). Tests fail (RED). TDD exemption: test-writing task.
